Course Projects

01 Technology Inventory

Personal Technology Audit

A comprehensive inventory of 20+ tools used across personal, educational, and professional contexts — evaluated across productivity, communication, organization, and creativity dimensions.

Research Google Docs Analysis
02 Technology Workflow

GitHub Copilot & Google Calendar Workflow

A two-week experiment integrating GitHub Copilot inside VS Code for rapid web prototyping and Google Calendar for time-blocking — evaluated using Rogers' Diffusion of Innovation framework.

GitHub Copilot VS Code Google Calendar HTML/CSS
03 AI Query Analysis

Ask AI — Prompt Engineering & Platform Analysis

Systematic comparison of ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini across four topic areas: AI ethics & accountability, career development, education, and business decision-making — with controlled experiments on how prompt wording shapes output.

ChatGPT Claude Gemini Prompt Engineering
04 Digital Media Authoring

Excel Budget Tracker Tutorial Video

A 3–5 minute tutorial video teaching beginners how to build a personal budget tracker in Excel from scratch — complete with storyboard, original screen recordings, narration, music, and a fully functional Excel template.

Excel QuickTime iMovie Claude AI

Beyond the Resume

Interests & Hobbies

✈️

Traveling & Study Abroad

Spent six months studying at Universidad Carlos III de Madrid, Spain. Living abroad built adaptability, cross-cultural communication, and a perspective no classroom could replicate — including paragliding over Colombia.

🌍

From navigating new countries solo to forming connections with people from across Europe and Latin America, travel has shaped how I approach challenges professionally and personally.

⛳

Golf

Golf has been a constant in my life — a game that rewards patience, precision, and mental discipline. Whether it's a competitive round or a casual 18 with friends, the course is one of my favorite places to reset and compete.

⛳
🏉

Rugby at TCU

Co-founded the TCU Rugby Club and have served as Treasurer since 2022. Rugby taught me what it means to build something from nothing — recruiting players, managing finances, coordinating with a conference, and competing as a team.

🏉
🎣

Hunting & Fishing

Grew up hunting and fishing and it's still one of my favorite ways to disconnect. There's a level of focus and patience required that I genuinely enjoy — whether it's early morning on the water or in a deer stand at dawn.

🎣
